display_name: npm Supply Chain — Compromised Package Registry
procedure_steps: BEFORE installing any npm package, check this registry for known compromised versions.
If the package+version matches a compromised entry, BLOCK the install and warn the agent.
If the package is listed but the version is safe, ALLOW but note the advisory.
If the package is not listed, ALLOW normally.
restrictions: NEVER install a compromised package version
ALWAYS check before npm install, npm add, yarn add, pnpm add
If a compromised version is already installed, alert the operator immediately
notes: Compromised package registry. Queried by the package-install hook before any npm install. Entries managed via /api/v1/aps/npm-supply-chain/advisories endpoint (future) or manually updated in this record's auth_details field.
